---
title: "Open Government Data, opendata.swiss"
date: "2026-02-22"
output: html_document
---

## Dataset: platform-v2

Neue Version v2 der Stammdaten und Metadaten vom System atlas (https://atlas.app.sbb.ch), bereitgestellt seit 7. Januar 2026 (atlas-v2).

[Direct link by **opendata.swiss** for dataset](https://opendata.swiss/de/dataset/platform-v2)<br>
[Direct link by **Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)** for dataset](https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/platform-v2)

Auto-generated R starter code for the dataset platform-v2@oevch.

## Metadata

- **Publisher.name** `nan`
- **Organization.display_name.de** `Geschäftsstelle Systemaufgaben Kundeninformation (SBB AG)`
- **Organization.url** `https://www.opentransportdata.swiss`
- **Maintainer** `None`
- **Maintainer_email** `None`
- **Keywords.de** `[]`
- **Issued** `2026-01-05T23:00:00`
- **Metadata_created** `2026-01-07T00:48:02.640921`
- **Metadata_modified** `2026-02-22T00:22:51.726306`


# Load packages

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)

```

# Load data

-   The dataset has 3 distribution(s) in CSV format.
-   All available CSV distributions are listed below and can be read into a tibble.

```{r}

# Distribution 0
# Package_id               : 93eb9d49-4181-4a25-9708-8eeb79462588
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:14:13.388682
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:14:13.388682
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/8e5931a6-b4aa-456a-9be4-498f28168861/resource/9880f5ac-04f1-413f-9e7d-2bb1fe2d4b5c/download/timetable-years-platform.csv')

# Distribution 1
# Package_id               : 93eb9d49-4181-4a25-9708-8eeb79462588
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:14:09.496672
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:14:09.496672
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/8e5931a6-b4aa-456a-9be4-498f28168861/resource/19920d40-6c3e-4896-8925-19d6faab492f/download/full-platform.csv')

# Distribution 2
# Package_id               : 93eb9d49-4181-4a25-9708-8eeb79462588
# Description              : 
# Issued                   : 2026-02-21T01:14:04.817285
# Modified                 : 2026-02-21T01:14:04.817285
# Rights                   : https://opendata.swiss/terms-of-use#terms_by

df <- read_delim('https://data.opentransportdata.swiss/dataset/8e5931a6-b4aa-456a-9be4-498f28168861/resource/665dc9db-6722-4955-8e85-060c38763152/download/actual-date-platform.csv')



```

# Analyze data

```{r}

glimpse(df)
str(df)
skim(df)

head(df)
tail(df)

```

# Continue your code here...

```{r}

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Contact

opendata@sbb.ch | Open data platform mobility Switzerland
